subject: refactor(state): remove imageCells concept entirely
body:
Removes layout.imageCells from the entire codebase. A cell has an image
if and only if the user assigned one via cellImages. Any cell can now have
both image and text — layout presets define structure only (grid shape,
sizes, alignments), not content placement.

Changes:
- layoutPresets.js: removed imageCells from all 35 presets, updated
  descriptions to be content-agnostic
- useAdState.js: removed imageCells from default state, simplified
  legacy migration, changed image auto-assign to use first empty cell,
  removed imageCells shifting/swapping in setLayout, simplified
  applyLayoutPreset to preserve text in place (no redistribution)
- LayoutTab.jsx: removed imageCells from CellGrid component and
  handleTypeChange, simplified cell styling to selection-based only
- ContentTab.jsx: removed imageCells variable and MiniCellGrid prop
- TemplatesTab.jsx: simplified preset matching to type + structure only
- MiniCellGrid.jsx: removed imageCells prop
- CLAUDE.md: updated state documentation

Tags: state, layout, refactor, simplification
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
Epic: imagecells-removal
Semver: minor
